itemScope="" class="border-t border-t-[#E2E2E2]" open=""><summary class="relative my-4 flex cursor-pointer items-center marker:hidden"><div class="grow font-medium"><div itemProp="name">How can I register a domain name?</div></div><div class="flex-none transition in-open:rotate-180"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="40" height="40" fill="none"><path fill="currentColor" d="M19.994 22.962q-.225 0-.4-.075a1.1 1.1 0 0 1-.35-.25l-4.425-4.425a.68.68 0 0 1-.212-.462q-.013-.263.212-.488t.475-.225.475.225l4.225 4.225 4.225-4.225a.68.68 0 0 1 starting:opacity-0"><div itemProp="acceptedAnswer" itemType="https://schema.org/Answer" itemScope=""><div class="typo-storefront-body-sm" itemProp="text" data-lexical-container="true"><p>You can <a target="_self" href="/en-gb/domain/domain-name-registration/">register a domain name</a> using the search bar at the top of this page. Enter your desired name and possibly a <a target="_self" href="/en-gb/domain/what-is-a-top-level-domain/">top-level domain</a>, and search. You will then see which domain names are still available. Add one or more domain names to your cart and follow the steps in the checkout. When your registration was completed successfully, we will send you an email, and you can get started.</p></div></div></div></details><details name="accordion__S_n_" itemProp="mainEntity" itemType="https://schema.org/Question" itemScope="" class="border-t border-t-[#E2E2E2]"><summary class="relative my-4 flex cursor-pointer items-center marker:hidden"><div class="grow font-medium"><div itemProp="name">How do I create a website?</div></div><div class="flex-none transition in-open:rotate-180"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="40" height="40" fill="none"><path fill="currentColor" d="M19.994 22.962q-.225 0-.4-.075a1.1 1.1 0 0 1-.35-.25l-4.425-4.425a.68.68 0 0 1-.212-.462q-.013-.263.212-.488t.475-.225.475.225l4.225 4.225 4.225-4.225a.68.68 0 0 1 .463-.212q.262-.013.487.212t.225.475-.225.475l-4.425 4.425q-.175.175-.35.25t-.4.075"></path></svg></div></summary><div class="my-4 hidden transition in-open:block starting:translate-y-2 starting:opacity-0"><div itemProp="acceptedAnswer" itemType="https://schema.org/Answer" itemScope=""><div class="typo-storefront-body-sm" itemProp="text" data-lexical-container="true"><p>You can <a target="_self" href="/en-gb/websitebuilder/create-your-own-website/">create a website</a> by purchasing a few things: a domain name, hosting and a website tool. A domain name allows visitors to reach your site. <a target="_self" href="/en-gb/hosting/what-is-web-hosting/">Hosting</a> is needed to display content on your site. And with a website tool, you build your website. Are you a novice builder? With <a target="_self" href="/en-gb/websitebuilder/">Website Builder</a>, you can create a site without coding. Do you have technical knowledge and want to build freely? Then <a target="_self" href="/en-gb/wordpress-hosting/">WordPress</a> suits you best. All our plans include Website Builder. This allows you to start building your website right away.</p></div></div></div></details><details name="accordion__S_n_" itemProp="mainEntity" itemType="https://schema.org/Question" itemScope="" class="border-t border-t-[#E2E2E2]"><summary class="relative my-4 flex cursor-pointer items-center marker:hidden"><div class="grow font-medium"><div itemProp="name">Which hosting do I need?</div></div><div class="flex-none transition in-open:rotate-180"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="40" height="40" fill="none"><path fill="currentColor" d="M19.994 22.962q-.225 0-.4-.075a1.1 1.1 0 0 1-.35-.25l-4.425-4.425a.68.68 0 0 1-.212-.462q-.013-.263.212-.488t.475-.225.475.225l4.225 4.225 4.225-4.225a.68.68 0 0 1 .463-.212q.262-.013.487.212t.225.475-.225.475l-4.425 4.425q-.175.175-.35.25t-.4.075"></path></svg></div></summary><div class="my-4 hidden transition in-open:block starting:translate-y-2 starting:opacity-0"><div itemProp="acceptedAnswer" itemType="https://schema.org/Answer" itemScope=""><div class="typo-storefront-body-sm" itemProp="text" data-lexical-container="true"><p>Which hosting you need depends on your needs. Are you going to build a simple website? Then the ‘Beginner’ plan is sufficient. Do you want to start a blog? With ‘Explorer’ you can create a blog on WordPress. Do you need powerful resources? For example, because you run several sites? Then choose ‘Enthusiast’ or ‘Guru’. Are you planning to <a target="_self" href="/en-gb/online-shop/create-your-own-online-shop/">create an online shop</a>? Then choose ‘Beginner’ in combination with the add-on ‘Website Builder Business + E-commerce’.</p></div></div></div></details><details name="accordion__S_n_" itemProp="mainEntity" itemType="https://schema.org/Question" itemScope="" class="border-t border-t-[#E2E2E2]"><summary class="relative my-4 flex cursor-pointer items-center marker:hidden"><div class="grow font-medium"><div itemProp="name">Do I get email with my website?</div></div><div class="flex-none transition in-open:rotate-180"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="40" height="40" fill="none"><path fill="currentColor" d="M19.994 22.962q-.225 0-.4-.075a1.1 1.1 0 0 1-.35-.25l-4.425-4.425a.68.68 0 0 1-.212-.462q-.013-.263.212-.488t.475-.225.475.225l4.225 4.225 4.225-4.225a.68.68 0 0 1 .463-.212q.262-.013.487.212t.225.475-.225.475l-4.425 4.425q-.175.175-.35.25t-.4.075"></path></svg></div></summary><div class="my-4 hidden transition in-open:block starting:translate-y-2 starting:opacity-0"><div itemProp="acceptedAnswer" itemType="https://schema.org/Answer" itemScope=""><div class="typo-storefront-body-sm" itemProp="text" data-lexical-container="true"><p>Yes, email is included with all our hosting packages. For this, you also need to purchase a domain name. Do you only want professional email with your own domain name? That is possible with <a target="_self" href="/en-gb/email/what-is-email-hosting/">email hosting</a>.</p></div></div></div></details><details name="accordion__S_n_" itemProp="mainEntity" itemType="https://schema.org/Question" itemScope="" class="border-t border-t-[#E2E2E2]"><summary class="relative my-4 flex cursor-pointer items-center marker:hidden"><div class="grow font-medium"><div itemProp="name">Is my website secure?</div></div><div class="flex-none transition in-open:rotate-180"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="40" height="40" fill="none"><path fill="currentColor" d="M19.994 22.962q-.225 0-.4-.075a1.1 1.1 0 0 1-.35-.25l-4.425-4.425a.68.68 0 0 1-.212-.462q-.013-.263.212-.488t.475-.225.475.225l4.225 4.225 4.225-4.225a.68.68 0 0 1 .463-.212q.262-.013.487.212t.225.475-.225.475l-4.425 4.425q-.175.175-.35.25t-.4.075"></path></svg></div></summary><div class="my-4 hidden transition in-open:block starting:translate-y-2 starting:opacity-0"><div itemProp="acceptedAnswer" itemType="https://schema.org/Answer" itemScope=""><div class="typo-storefront-body-sm" itemProp="text" data-lexical-container="true"><p>We help you make your website more secure. With all our hosting plans, you receive a free <a target="_self" href="/en-gb/website-security/what-is-an-ssl-certificate/">SSL certificate</a> to ensure a secure website connection for visitors. In the unlikely event that something goes wrong with your site, there is no need to worry. We make daily back-ups of your files, email and databases. We also continuously scan for malware to protect your site against cyberattacks. Want extra security? Then purchase one of <a target="_self" href="/en-gb/website-security/sitelock/">SiteLock</a>‘s add-ons: Find or Fix.</p><p>In some ways, you are also responsible for the security of your site. For instance, by using a strong password. You will find useful tips in our article on <a target="_self" href="/en-gb/website-security/">website security</a>.</p></div></div></div></details><details name="accordion__S_n_" itemProp="mainEntity" itemType="https://schema.org/Question" itemScope="" class="border-t border-t-[#E2E2E2]"><summary class="relative my-4 flex cursor-pointer items-center marker:hidden"><div class="grow font-medium"><div itemProp="name">How can I manage my products?</div></div><div class="flex-none transition in-open:rotate-180"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="40" height="40" fill="none"><path fill="currentColor" d="M19.994 22.962q-.225 0-.4-.075a1.1 1.1 0 0 1-.35-.25l-4.425-4.425a.68.68 0 0 1-.212-.462q-.013-.263.212-.488t.475-.225.475.225l4.225 4.225 4.225-4.225a.68.68 0 0 1 .463-.212q.262-.013.487.212t.225.475-.225.475l-4.425 4.425q-.175.175-.35.25t-.4.075"></path></svg></div></summary><div class="my-4 hidden transition in-open:block starting:translate-y-2 starting:opacity-0"><div itemProp="acceptedAnswer" itemType="https://schema.org/Answer" itemScope=""><div class="typo-storefront-body-sm" itemProp="text" data-lexical-container="true"><p>You can manage your services via your own Control Panel. To do so, click on ‘Log in’ &gt; ‘Control Panel’ at the top right of our website. The Control Panel also gives you direct access to Website Builder and Webshop.</p></div></div></div></details><details name="accordion__S_n_" itemProp="mainEntity" itemType="https://schema.org/Question" itemScope="" class="border-t border-t-[#E2E2E2]"><summary class="relative my-4 flex cursor-pointer items-center marker:hidden"><div class="grow font-medium"><div itemProp="name">What support do I get at one.com?</div></div><div class="flex-none transition in-open:rotate-180"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="40" height="40" fill="none"><path fill="currentColor" d="M19.994 22.962q-.225 0-.4-.075a1.1 1.1 0 0 1-.35-.25l-4.425-4.425a.68.68 0 0 1-.212-.462q-.013-.263.212-.488t.475-.225.475.225l4.225 4.225 4.225-4.225a.68.68 0 0 1 .463-.212q.262-.013.487.212t.225.475-.225.475l-4.425 4.425q-.175.175-.35.25t-.4.075"></path></svg></div></summary><div class="my-4 hidden transition in-open:block starting:translate-y-2 starting:opacity-0"><div itemProp="acceptedAnswer" itemType="https://schema.org/Answer" itemScope=""><div class="typo-storefront-body-sm" itemProp="text" data-lexical-container="true"><p>At one.com we are happy to help you.
